name: @prana/pool-worker
description: PRANA auto-switching worker daemon (SS1 / backlog XX17 + PR9 vardiff). GridCoin-style contributor agent: connects to a coordinator, does HASH (microhash) or TASK (AI) work, submits shares. SKELETON — stratum/CUDA stubbed; control flow, vardiff, lane-switching and the share->credit shapes are real and testable.
author: Van Kush Family Research Institute (VKFRI)
